title: Sexually Transmitted Infection (STI) Tests: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
Library: Diseases & Conditions [Internet]. Cleveland (OH): Cleveland Clinic; c2024. Sexually Transmitted Infections; [reviewed 2023 Feb 3; cited 2024 Jun 11]; [about 16 screens].
